title: Regular Expression Validator
scenario: Generate a Java regular expression that matches any string that contains at least one digit and one uppercase letter. The regular expression should not match strings that contain only digits or only uppercase letters.
constraints: Must match strings with at least one digit and one uppercase letter
Must not match strings with only digits
Must not match strings with only uppercase letters

evaluationCriteria.description: The regular expression matches strings with at least one digit
The regular expression matches strings with at least one uppercase letter
The regular expression does not match strings with only digits
The regular expression does not match strings with only uppercase letters
